## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Okta and GrowthX to discuss progress on artifacts, account prioritization, and strategic initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/JhH43cprExUE3M-j7XBiTyAsW8_zStJi?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX has made progress on B2B SaaS and health tech artifacts; FinServ and FinTech to be treated separately](https://fathom.video/share/JhH43cprExUE3M-j7XBiTyAsW8_zStJi?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
  - [Rachael is refining retail account lists (\~1000-1500) for US, UK/Ireland, and Australia/NZ markets](https://fathom.video/share/JhH43cprExUE3M-j7XBiTyAsW8_zStJi?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)
  - [Team discussing how to prioritize and batch accounts for artifact creation (20-25/week realistic capacity)](https://fathom.video/share/JhH43cprExUE3M-j7XBiTyAsW8_zStJi?tab=summary&timestamp=977.0)
  - [Need to improve go-to-market understanding and content quality across Okta teams](https://fathom.video/share/JhH43cprExUE3M-j7XBiTyAsW8_zStJi?tab=summary&timestamp=1463.0)

## Topics

### Artifact Progress and Refinement

  - [B2B SaaS and health tech artifacts in progress](https://fathom.video/share/JhH43cprExUE3M-j7XBiTyAsW8_zStJi?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
  - [FinServ and FinTech to be treated as separate categories](https://fathom.video/share/JhH43cprExUE3M-j7XBiTyAsW8_zStJi?tab=summary&timestamp=556.0)
  - [Qantas/hospitality pipeline artifact created for review](https://fathom.video/share/JhH43cprExUE3M-j7XBiTyAsW8_zStJi?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)
  - [Gunnar (Clay) helping refine data pools for more accurate account information](https://fathom.video/share/JhH43cprExUE3M-j7XBiTyAsW8_zStJi?tab=summary&timestamp=792.0)

### Account Prioritization Strategy

  - [Focus on enterprise and upper corporate retail accounts (6-figure deals)](https://fathom.video/share/JhH43cprExUE3M-j7XBiTyAsW8_zStJi?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)
  - [\~3000 retail accounts identified, expecting 1000-1500 after filtering](https://fathom.video/share/JhH43cprExUE3M-j7XBiTyAsW8_zStJi?tab=summary&timestamp=905.0)
  - [Tiering system proposed: Tier 1 for accounts meeting 50%+ of signals](https://fathom.video/share/JhH43cprExUE3M-j7XBiTyAsW8_zStJi?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
  - [Considering ABM approach vs. demand gen for prioritization](https://fathom.video/share/JhH43cprExUE3M-j7XBiTyAsW8_zStJi?tab=summary&timestamp=1022.0)
  - [GrowthX capacity \~20-25 detailed account reviews per week](https://fathom.video/share/JhH43cprExUE3M-j7XBiTyAsW8_zStJi?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)

### Internal Okta Challenges

  - [Many marketers lack foundational go-to-market understanding](https://fathom.video/share/JhH43cprExUE3M-j7XBiTyAsW8_zStJi?tab=summary&timestamp=1463.0)
  - [Current content described as "very weak" and often irrelevant](https://fathom.video/share/JhH43cprExUE3M-j7XBiTyAsW8_zStJi?tab=summary&timestamp=1607.0)
  - [Email outreach examples shared, highlighting poor quality/approach](https://fathom.video/share/JhH43cprExUE3M-j7XBiTyAsW8_zStJi?tab=summary&timestamp=1706.0)
  - [Need for better understanding of business and customer challenges](https://fathom.video/share/JhH43cprExUE3M-j7XBiTyAsW8_zStJi?tab=summary&timestamp=1774.0)

### Improving Content and Strategy

  - [Using artifacts to brainstorm relevant webinar topics and content](https://fathom.video/share/JhH43cprExUE3M-j7XBiTyAsW8_zStJi?tab=summary&timestamp=1556.0)
  - [Focusing on addressing specific customer challenges (e.g., frictionless login, cart abandonment)](https://fathom.video/share/JhH43cprExUE3M-j7XBiTyAsW8_zStJi?tab=summary&timestamp=1556.0)
  - [Leveraging AI (ChatGPT, Notebook LM) to refine ideas and identify common challenges](https://fathom.video/share/JhH43cprExUE3M-j7XBiTyAsW8_zStJi?tab=summary&timestamp=1821.0)

### Team Updates

  - [New hire starting in 10 days to help with adoption/enablement](https://fathom.video/share/JhH43cprExUE3M-j7XBiTyAsW8_zStJi?tab=summary&timestamp=1916.0)
  - [Potential second hire being considered (location challenges noted)](https://fathom.video/share/JhH43cprExUE3M-j7XBiTyAsW8_zStJi?tab=summary&timestamp=1936.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Rachael to review B2B SaaS and Qantas/hospitality artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/JhH43cprExUE3M-j7XBiTyAsW8_zStJi?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
  - [Sydney to send refined B2B SaaS artifact for review](https://fathom.video/share/JhH43cprExUE3M-j7XBiTyAsW8_zStJi?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)

  - [Team to explore creating synthesized artifacts for ABM/demand gen use](https://fathom.video/share/JhH43cprExUE3M-j7XBiTyAsW8_zStJi?tab=summary&timestamp=1619.0)
  - [Rachael to share insights from upcoming ABM team meeting](https://fathom.video/share/JhH43cprExUE3M-j7XBiTyAsW8_zStJi?tab=summary&timestamp=1857.0)
  - [GrowthX to experiment with new prompt structures for ABM/demand gen](https://fathom.video/share/JhH43cprExUE3M-j7XBiTyAsW8_zStJi?tab=summary&timestamp=1857.0)
